metadata.description: Testomatio.io plugins and skills for managing tests, test cases, test automation, results, coverage etc

plugins.name: test-management
plugins.description: Adds a /test-management skill for test management

plugins.name: test-automation
plugins.description: Adds a /test-automation skill for test automation (create, heal, sync results, etc)

plugins.name: explorbot
plugins.description: Adds /explorbot-setup, /explorbot-api-setup, /explorbot-fundamentals and /explorbot-plan skills to install, configure, run, debug and plan Explorbot autonomous AI web and API tests
